3140940.name: The Liminal Dimension Soundtrack
3140940.description:
Immerse yourself in the haunting atmosphere of "The Liminal Dimension" with the official DLC Soundtrack. This unique audio experience enhances the eerie and surreal journey of the game, taking you back to the unsettling liminal spaces where reality blurs with illusion.

The soundtrack includes:

  • Music from the Game: Relive the tension and mystery with the original tracks that set the tone for your journey through "The Liminal Dimension."

  • Unused Tracks: Discover music that didn’t make it into the final game, offering new layers of immersion and tension that expand the atmosphere of the game.

  • Ambient Sounds: Experience the haunting ambient sounds of the rooms, water, and other environments the player encounters, providing an immersive soundscape that captures the unsettling quiet of "The Liminal Dimension."

Perfect for fans of atmospheric horror and those who want to relive the chilling experience through sound alone, the "Liminal Dimension DLC Soundtrack" will pull you back into the enigmatic world of the game.
